text: 'ykhh  yshbh bdd h'yr rbty 'm hyth kh'lmnh rbty bgvym shrty bmdynvt hyth lms    s
bkhv tbkhh blylh vdm'th 'l lchyh 'yn-lh mnchm mkhl-'hbyh khl-r'yh bgdv bh hyv lh l'ybym    s
glth yhvdh m'ny vmrb 'bdh hy' yshbh bgvym l' mts'h mnvch khl-rdfyh hshygvh byn hmtsrym    s
drkhy tsyvn 'blvt mbly b'y mv'd khl-sh'ryh shvmmyn khhnyh n'nchym btvltyh nvgvt  vhy' mr-lh    s
hyv tsryh lr'sh 'ybyh shlv khy-yhvh hvgh 'l rb-fsh'yh 'vllyh hlkhv shby lfny-tsr    s
vyts' [mn-bt- kh] (mbt-tsyvn q) khl-hdrh hyv shryh kh'ylym l'-mts'v mr'h vylkhv bl'-khch lfny rvdf    s
zkhrh yrvshlm ymy 'nyh vmrvdyh khl mchmdyh 'shr hyv mymy qdm bnfl 'mh byd-tsr v'yn 'vzr lh r'vh tsrym shchqv 'l  mshbth    s
cht' cht'h yrvshlm 'l-khn lnydh hyth khl-mkhbdyh hzylvh khy-r'v 'rvth gm-hy' n'nchh vtshb 'chvr    s
tm'th bshvlyh l' zkhrh 'chryth vtrd fl'ym 'yn mnchm lh r'h yhvh 't-'nyy khy hgdyl 'vyb    s
ydv frsh tsr 'l khl-mchmdyh khy-r'th gvym b'v mqdshh 'shr tsvyth l'-yb'v bqhl lkh    s
khl-'mh n'nchym mbqshym lchm ntnv [mchmvdyhm kh] (mchmdyhm  q) b'khl lhshyb nfsh r'h yhvh vhbyth khy hyyty zvllh    s
lv' 'lykhm khl-'bry drkh hbytv vr'v 'm-ysh mkh'vb khmkh'by 'shr 'vll ly 'shr hvgh yhvh byvm chrvn 'fv    s
mmrvm shlch-'sh b'tsmty vyrdnh frsh rsht lrgly hshybny 'chvr ntnny shmmh khl-hyvm dvh    s
nshqd 'l fsh'y bydv yshtrgv  'lv 'l-tsv'ry hkhshyl khchy ntnny 'dny bydy l'-'vkhl qvm    s
slh khl-'byry  'dny bqrby qr' 'ly mv'd lshbr bchvry gt drkh 'dny lbtvlt bt-yhvdh    s
'l-'lh  'ny bvkhyh 'yny  'yny yrdh mym khy-rchq mmny mnchm mshyb nfshy hyv bny shvmmym khy gbr 'vyb    s
frshh tsyvn bydyh 'yn mnchm lh tsvh yhvh ly'qb sbybyv tsryv hyth yrvshlm lndh bynyhm    s
tsdyq hv' yhvh khy fyhv mryty shm'v-n' khl- ['mym kh] (h'mym q) vr'v mkh'by btvlty vbchvry hlkhv bshby    s
qr'ty lm'hby hmh rmvny khhny vzqny b'yr gv'v khy-bqshv 'khl lmv vyshybv 't-nfshm    s
r'h yhvh khy-tsr-ly m'y chmrmrv nhfkh lby bqrby khy mrv mryty mchvts shkhlh-chrb bbyt khmvt    s
shm'v khy n'nchh 'ny 'yn mnchm ly khl-'yby shm'v r'ty shshv khy 'th 'shyt hb't yvm-qr't vyhyv khmvny    s
tb' khl-r'tm lfnykh v'vll lmv kh'shr 'vllt ly 'l khl-fsh'y khy-rbvt 'nchty vlby dvy  f
'ykhh y'yb b'fv  'dny 't-bt-tsyvn hshlykh mshmym 'rts tf'rt yshr'l vl'-zkhr hdm-rglyv byvm 'fv    s
bl' 'dny [l' kh] (vl' q) chml 't khl-n'vt y'qb hrs b'brtv mbtsry bt-yhvdh hgy' l'rts chll mmlkhh vshryh    s
gd' bchry-'f khl qrn yshr'l hshyb 'chvr ymynv mfny 'vyb vyb'r by'qb kh'sh lhbh 'khlh sbyb    s
drkh qshtv kh'vyb ntsb ymynv khtsr vyhrg khl mchmdy-'yn b'hl bt-tsyvn shfkh kh'sh chmtv    s
hyh 'dny  kh'vyb bl' yshr'l bl' khl-'rmnvtyh shcht mbtsryv vyrb bbt-yhvdh t'nyh v'nyh    s
vychms khgn shkhv shcht mv'dv shkhch yhvh  btsyvn mv'd vshbt vyn'ts bz'm-'fv mlkh vkhhn    s
znch 'dny  mzbchv n'r mqdshv hsgyr byd-'vyb chvmt 'rmnvtyh qvl ntnv bbyt-yhvh khyvm mv'd    s
chshb yhvh  lhshchyt chvmt bt-tsyvn nth qv l'-hshyb ydv mbl' vy'bl-chl vchvmh ychdv 'mllv    s
tb'v b'rts sh'ryh 'bd vshbr brychyh mlkhh vshryh bgvym 'yn tvrh gm-nby'yh l'-mts'v chzvn myhvh    s
yshbv l'rts ydmv zqny bt-tsyvn h'lv 'fr 'l-r'shm chgrv shqym hvrydv l'rts r'shn btvlt yrvshlm    s
khlv bdm'vt 'yny chmrmrv m'y nshfkh l'rts khbdy 'l-shbr bt-'my b'tf 'vll vyvnq brchbvt qryh    s
l'mtm y'mrv 'yh dgn vyyn bht'tfm khchll brchbvt 'yr bhshtfkh nfshm 'l-chyq 'mtm    s
mh-''ydkh mh 'dmh-lkh hbt yrvshlm mh 'shvh-lkh v'nchmkh btvlt bt-tsyvn khy-gdvl khym shbrkh my yrf'-lkh    s
nby'ykh chzv lkh shv' vtfl vl'-glv 'l-'vnkh lhshyb [shbytkh kh] (shbvtkh q) vychzv lkh msh'vt shv' vmdvchym    s
sfqv 'lykh khfym khl-'bry drkh shrqv vyn'v r'shm 'l-bt yrvshlm hz't h'yr shy'mrv khlylt yfy mshvsh  lkhl-h'rts    s
ftsv 'lykh fyhm khl-'vybykh shrqv vychrqv-shn 'mrv bl'nv 'kh zh hyvm shqvynhv mts'nv r'ynv    s
'shh yhvh 'shr zmm bts' 'mrtv 'shr tsvh mymy-qdm hrs vl' chml vyshmch 'lykh 'vyb hrym qrn tsrykh    s
ts'q lbm 'l-'dny chvmt bt-tsyvn hvrydy khnchl dm'h yvmm vlylh 'l-ttny fvgt lkh 'l-tdm bt-'ynkh    s
qvmy  rny [blyl kh] (blylh  q) lr'sh 'shmrvt shfkhy khmym lbkh nkhch fny 'dny sh'y 'lyv khfykh 'l-nfsh 'vllykh h'tvfym br'b br'sh khl-chvtsvt    s
r'h yhvh vhbyth lmy 'vllt khh 'm-t'khlnh nshym frym 'lly tfchym 'm-yhrg bmqdsh 'dny khhn vnby'    s
shkhbv l'rts chvtsvt n'r vzqn btvlty vbchvry nflv bchrb hrgt byvm 'fkh tbcht l' chmlt    s
tqr' khyvm mv'd mgvry msbyb vl' hyh byvm 'f-yhvh flyt vshryd 'shr-tfchty vrbyty 'yby khlm  f
